name: Emmett's
teaser: The only place I would order Chicago Deep Dish in the state of New York.
review: This is the only place I would order Chicago Deep Dish or Tavern Style in the state of New York. It's really good. The counter: If I am looking for top shelf Chicago pizza, I'm probably going directly to the source â especially when you have the best pizza in the country around you.
headsUp: The only reason to order Chicago deep dish in New York. Seriously.
update: Tavern-style has improved considerably. Worth trying alongside the deep dish.
address: 50 MacDougal St, New York, NY 10012, USA
hours: Monday: 5:00 – 11:00 PM · Tuesday: 5:00 – 11:00 PM · Wednesday: 12:00 – 11:00 PM · Thursday: 12:00 PM – 12:00 AM · Friday: 12:00 PM – 1:00 AM · Saturday: 12:00 PM – 1:00 AM · Sunday: 12:00 – 10:00 PM
